tasks.subject: Task 1: Project skeleton + scrambler core + layout helpers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Scaffold the Go module and implement the ECMA-130 scramble table and the LBA/MSF/byte-offset arithmetic.

**Files:**
- Create: go.mod
- Create: scrambler.go
- Create: scrambler_test.go
- Create: layout.go
- Create: layout_test.go

**Verify:** `cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test ./... -run 'Scramble|Layout|MSF|LBA' -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["go.mod","scrambler.go","scrambler_test.go","layout.go","layout_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test ./... -run 'Scramble|Layout|MSF|LBA' -v","acceptanceCriteria":["go test passes","Scramble self-inverse","table sha256 matches constant","sync bytes zero","BCDMSF/LBA round-trip","ScramOffset arithmetic"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Cue parser
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Lightweight cue scanner extracting TRACK n MODE/AUDIO and INDEX 01 m:s:f.

**Files:**
- Create: cue.go
- Create: cue_test.go

**Verify:** `cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test -run TestCue -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["cue.go","cue_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test -run TestCue -v","acceptanceCriteria":["single track parses","multi-track + audio parses","MODE2 accepted","unknown mode rejected","comments and blanks ignored"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Manifest type + container framing
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Manifest JSON struct + on-disk container format (magic + version + length + manifest + delta).

**Files:**
- Create: manifest.go
- Create: manifest_test.go

**Verify:** `cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test -run 'TestContainer|TestErrorSectorsCapped' -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["manifest.go","manifest_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test -run 'TestContainer|TestErrorSectorsCapped' -v","acceptanceCriteria":["round-trip identity","bad magic rejected","unknown version rejected","error_sectors capped at 10k"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: xdelta3 subprocess wrapper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wrap xdelta3 binary for encode and decode with stderr capture.

**Files:**
- Create: xdelta3.go
- Create: xdelta3_test.go

**Verify:** `cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test -run TestXDelta3 -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["xdelta3.go","xdelta3_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test -run TestXDelta3 -v","acceptanceCriteria":["round-trip","missing binary error","skip when xdelta3 absent"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Status reporter
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Reporter interface with TTY-aware text output and quiet mode.

**Files:**
- Create: reporter.go
- Create: reporter_test.go

**Verify:** `cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test -run TestReporter -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["reporter.go","reporter_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test -run TestReporter -v","acceptanceCriteria":["Step.Done writes label+result","Step.Fail writes error","quiet writes nothing","Info/Warn formatting"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Epsilon-hat builder + lockstep pre-check
tasks.description:
**Goal:** BuildEpsilonHat produces same-size reconstructed scrambled image and identifies error sectors.

**Files:**
- Create: builder.go
- Create: builder_test.go

**Verify:** `cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test -run TestBuilder -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["builder.go","builder_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test -run TestBuilder -v","acceptanceCriteria":["clean disc bytes equal","one error sector detected","layout mismatch >5% aborts","epsilon-hat size matches scram size"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Pack pipeline
tasks.description:
**Goal:** End-to-end pack: parse cue, auto-detect write offset, hash, build ε̂, run xdelta3, write container, inline-verify.

**Files:**
- Create: pack.go
- Create: pack_test.go

**Verify (after Task 8):** `cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test -run 'TestPack|TestUnpack' -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["pack.go","pack_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test -run TestPack -v","acceptanceCriteria":["valid container produced","write offset detected","scram sha256 recorded","zero error sectors on clean disc"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Unpack pipeline
tasks.description:
**Goal:** End-to-end unpack: read container, verify bin sha256, rebuild ε̂, run xdelta3 -d, verify output sha256.

**Files:**
- Create: unpack.go
- Create: unpack_test.go

**Verify:** `cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test -run 'TestPack|TestUnpack' -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["unpack.go","unpack_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test -run 'TestPack|TestUnpack' -v","acceptanceCriteria":["round-trip byte-equal","wrong bin rejected","no overwrite without force","output sha256 matches manifest"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: CLI / file discovery / source removal / main
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire pipelines into a real CLI: --help, file discovery, default outputs, force, source removal, exit codes.

**Files:**
- Create: discover.go
- Create: discover_test.go
- Create: main.go
- Create: help.go
- Create: main_test.go

**Verify:** `cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test ./... -v && go build ./... && ./miniscram --help`

```json:metadata
{"files":["discover.go","discover_test.go","main.go","help.go","main_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test ./... -v && go build ./... && ./miniscram --help","acceptanceCriteria":["pack --help works","discovery cwd+stem","default output paths","verified pack removes source","keep-source honored","cross-fs refused without flag","exit codes correct"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Real-world Deus Ex end-to-end test (build-tagged)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Full pipeline against the 1.7 GB Deus Ex Redumper dump.

**Files:**
- Create: e2e_redump_test.go (build tag: redump_data)

**Verify:** `cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test -tags redump_data -run TestE2EDeusEx -timeout 10m -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["e2e_redump_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"cd /home/hugh/miniscram && go test -tags redump_data -run TestE2EDeusEx -timeout 10m -v","acceptanceCriteria":["pack succeeds","zero error sectors","delta < 1% of scram","byte-equal recovery"]}
```
